serviceNotes.engine oil: S55 M engine: BMW M performance service plans often specify shorter oil intervals than standard 3 Series (commonly 15,000 km / 12 months EU). Track and spirited driving warrant 10,000 km changes. Sources: BMW M service guides, enthusiast workshop data.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Cabin filter per M maintenance schedule.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; track use may require more frequent bleeding.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: High-flow intake path; replace per CBS / inspection (~60,000 km planning).
serviceNotes.spark plugs: High-output turbo I6: plugs typically earlier than non-M DI engines (~60,000 km). Confirm M supplement.
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Track and road use wear fronts quickly; inspect at least every 20,000 km or before track days.
serviceNotes.check rear brake pads: Inspect every 20,000 km or with front service.
serviceNotes.vehicle check: M-specific vehicle check / inspection intervals are shorter than standard F30.
serviceNotes.M-DCT gearbox fluid: M3 with M DCT (GS7D36SG): DCT fluid and filter service is critical for shift quality and clutch longevity. Many specialists recommend ~60,000 km despite BMW's lifetime fill classification.
serviceNotes.manual gearbox fluid: Manual transmission: shorter gear oil interval (~60,000 km) is prudent under M use.
serviceNotes.differential fluids: M limited-slip rear differential: fresh fluid ~60,000 km is a common M specialist recommendation.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: High thermal load turbo engine; preventive coolant service ~100,000 km.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: S55 DI: intake valve deposits; inspect/clean from ~80,000 km for rough idle or power loss.
